verified: Third-party review (vettedpropfirms.com) + industry sources - verified 2026-04-21. Official site returned 403 from automated check.
description: Austin TX prop firm founded 2022. Futures-only. One-step evaluation with live trailing threshold (no daily loss). $520M+ reported payouts. NinjaTrader + Rithmic integrations. Operates in 150+ countries.

rules.description: Live trailing threshold. Trails the highest intraday equity (not end-of-day like TopStep). Threshold distance stays fixed relative to equity high. Once Threshold reaches starting balance, it locks permanently. Breaching IS a violation.
Profit target to advance to funded account. Varies by account size.
23 hours daily including holidays and news events. News trading explicitly allowed (unlike most other prop firms).
Maximum contract count per account size. Full-size contracts during evaluation.

profit_split.notes: 100% on first $25K, then 90% after. Best split structure in industry for small accounts.

payout.notes: Payouts every 8 calendar days. No waiting period like FTMO's 14 days.

other_features.description: Up to 20 funded accounts simultaneously. Unlimited resets at $80/attempt. Real-time market data included (~$55/mo value).
